# ARCHITECTURE.md — My-Flutter-App

**Generated by:** Architecture Agent v2  
**Date:** 2026-03-28  
**Total Files:** 27 Dart files | ~2673 LOC

---

## 1. Struktur-Analyse (Current State)

### Verzeichnisübersicht

```
lib/
├── main.dart                          (55 LOC)  — App-Einstieg, Provider Setup
├── models/
│   ├── article.dart                   — Plain Model, no Hive
│   ├── conversation.dart              — HiveObject, Chat-Verlauf
│   ├── conversation.g.dart            — Generated Hive Adapter
│   ├── kali_personality.dart          — Personality-Model (Static Data)
│   ├── message.dart                   — HiveObject, Chat-Nachricht
│   └── message.g.dart                 — Generated Hive Adapter
├── providers/
│   ├── article_provider.dart          — ChangeNotifier, Article State
│   ├── chat_provider.dart             — ChangeNotifier, Chat + Streaming State
│   └── settings_provider.dart         — ChangeNotifier, API-Keys + Settings
├── screens/
│   ├── article_detail_page.dart       — Article Detail View
│   ├── chat_screen.dart               — Main Chat Screen
│   ├── conversations_screen.dart      — Conversation List
│   ├── home_page.dart                 — Home/Landing
│   └── settings_screen.dart           — Settings UI
├── services/
│   ├── ai_api_service.dart            — Abstract Interface (AiApiService)
│   ├── article_service.dart           — HTTP Client für Articles
│   ├── claude_service.dart            — Claude API (Streaming)
│   ├── gemini_service.dart            — Gemini API (Streaming)
│   └── openai_service.dart            — OpenAI API (Streaming)
├── storage/
│   └── hive_storage.dart              — Singleton, Hive Box Management
├── theme/
│   └── kali_colors.dart               — Farbpalette
└── widgets/
    ├── chat_bubble.dart               — Message Bubble UI
    ├── conversation_list_item.dart    — Conversation List Tile
    ├── conversation_list_skeleton.dart— Loading Skeleton
    ├── message_input.dart             — Text Input Widget
    └── streaming_indicator.dart       — Streaming Animation
```

### Stärken der aktuellen Struktur

- **Service-Abstraktion:** `AiApiService` als Abstract Interface ist solide — OpenAI/Claude/Gemini sind implementierungen.
- **Provider-Pattern:** State Management mit `ChangeNotifier` + `provider` Package. Funktioniert.
- **Hive-Storage:** Lokales Speichern mit Singleton Pattern. Gut für Offline-First.
- **Separation Screens/Widgets:** Trennung zwischen Seiten und wiederverwendbaren Widgets existiert.

### Schwächen / Probleme

1. **Kein Clean Architecture Layer:** Services sind direkt von Providers abhängig. Kein Use-Case-Layer, kein Repository-Layer.
2. **Provider sind Monolithen:** `ChatProvider` handelt State + Business Logic + Service-Interaktion in einer Klasse.
3. **Hive-Tight-Coupling:** Models direkt an Hive-Annotationen gekoppelt. Migration zu Isar/Drift erfordert Umbau der Models.
4. **Kein Dependency Injection:** Services werden manuell in `main.dart` zusammengebaut. Kein `get_it` oder `injectable`.
5. **Kein Router:** Navigator 1.0 mit named routes. Kein `go_router` oder `auto_route`.
6. **Theme-Inkonsistenz:** Nur `kali_colors.dart`, kein vollständiges Theme.
7. **Kein Error-Handling-System:** Errors werden lokal in Providers gefangen, kein zentrales Error-Model.
8. **SettingsProvider mischt Concerns:** API-Keys, Modell-Selection und Personality sind ein Klumpen.
9. **Article-Feature existiert parallel:** Fühlt sich nach Feature-Flag / separatem Modul, ist aber inline.

---

## 2. Clean Architecture Vorschlag

### Layer-Diagramm

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│              PRESENTATION                    │
│  Screens │ Widgets │ Providers (State Only)  │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│              DOMAIN                         │
│  Entities │ Repositories (Abstract) │ UseCases│
├─────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│              DATA                           │
│  Repository Impl │ Services │ Storage       │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

### Regeln

- **Presentation → Domain:** Darf nur Domain-Entities und UseCases importieren.
- **Domain:** Keine Flutter-Dependencies. Pure Dart. Keine Imports nach außen.
- **Data → Domain:** Implementiert Repository-Interfaces aus Domain. Importiert Services, Storage, HTTP.

---

## 4. Migration Guide (Schritt-für-Schritt)

### Phase 1: Foundation (1-2 Tage)

| Step | Action | Risk |
|------|--------|------|
| 1.1 | Add `get_it`, `go_router`, `dartz` (Either), `equatable` to pubspec.yaml | Low |
| 1.2 | Create `core/` directory mit constants, errors, router, theme, di | Low |
| 1.3 | Move `kali_colors.dart` → `core/theme/app_colors.dart`, erweitere zu vollständigem Theme | Low |
| 1.4 | Implementiere `core/errors/failures.dart` mit Failure-Klassen | Low |
| 1.5 | Setup `go_router` in `core/router/app_router.dart` | Medium |
| 1.6 | Setup `get_it` in `core/di/injection_container.dart` | Medium |

### Phase 2: Domain Layer (2-3 Tage)

| Step | Action | Risk |
|------|--------|------|
| 2.1 | Erstelle `features/chat/domain/entities/conversation.dart` + `message.dart` (Pure Dart, kein Hive) | Low |
| 2.2 | Erstelle `features/chat/domain/repositories/chat_repository.dart` (Abstract) | Low |
| 2.3 | Erstelle UseCases: `send_message.dart`, `stream_response.dart`, `load_conversations.dart`, `delete_conversation.dart` | Low |
| 2.4 | Repeat für `articles/` und `settings/` | Low |

### Phase 3: Data Layer (2-3 Tage)

| Step | Action | Risk |
|------|--------|------|
| 3.1 | Dupliziere Models als `*_model.dart` mit Hive-Annotationen + `fromJson/toJson` | Medium |
| 3.2 | Erstelle Datasources: `chat_local_datasource.dart` (Hive), `chat_remote_datasource.dart` (AI APIs) | Medium |
| 3.3 | Implementiere `chat_repository_impl.dart` die UseCases bedient | Medium |
| 3.4 | Refactor `HiveStorage` → `chat_local_datasource.dart` (gleiche Logik, neuer Ort) | Low |
| 3.5 | Refactor AI Services → `chat_remote_datasource.dart` (gleiche Code, neuer Namespace) | Low |
| 3.6 | Repeat für articles und settings | Medium |

### Phase 4: Presentation Refactor (2-3 Tage)

| Step | Action | Risk |
|------|--------|------|
| 4.1 | Refactor Providers: Nur noch State + UseCase-Aufrufe. Entferne Business Logic. | High |
| 4.2 | Ersetze Navigator 1.0 mit go_router | High |
| 4.3 | Move Widgets → `features/*/presentation/widgets/` | Low |
| 4.4 | Move Screens → `features/*/presentation/pages/` | Low |
| 4.5 | Update `main.dart` → `app.dart` + DI init | Medium |

### Phase 5: Cleanup (1 Tag)

| Step | Action | Risk |
|------|--------|------|
| 5.1 | Delete alte Dateien aus `lib/models/`, `lib/services/`, `lib/storage/`, `lib/screens/`, `lib/widgets/` | Low |
| 5.2 | Delete `lib/theme/` (ersetzt durch `core/theme/`) | Low |
| 5.3 | Run `dart analyze` und fixe alle Issues | Low |
| 5.4 | Run Tests, fixe Broken Imports | Medium |
| 5.5 | Final PR Review | — |

**Gesamt-Dauer: 8-12 Tage**

## 5. Refactoring Tasks (Backlog)

### P0 — Critical (Diese Woche)

- [ ] **R-001:** `lib/core/errors/failures.dart` erstellen — ServerFailure, CacheFailure, NetworkFailure
- [ ] **R-002:** `lib/core/di/injection_container.dart` erstellen — get_it Setup mit allen Dependencies
- [ ] **R-003:** Domain Entities erstellen — reine Dart-Klassen ohne Hive-Annotationen
- [ ] **R-004:** Repository-Interfaces in Domain definieren (Abstract classes)

### P1 — High (Nächste Woche)

- [ ] **R-005:** `ChatProvider` splitten — Business Logic → UseCases, State → Provider
- [ ] **R-006:** `SettingsProvider` aufteilen — 3 Concerns: API Keys, Provider Config, Personality
- [ ] **R-007:** `go_router` einführen — alle Navigation migrieren
- [ ] **R-008:** Feature-basierte Ordnerstruktur erstellen (chat/, articles/, settings/)

### P2 — Medium (Sprint 2)

- [ ] **R-009:** Datasource-Layer erstellen — Local (Hive) und Remote (HTTP) trennen
- [ ] **R-010:** `ArticleService` → `ArticleRemoteDatasource` + `ArticleRepositoryImpl`
- [ ] **R-011:** Model-Copy als `*_model.dart` für Data-Layer (Domain Entities bleiben clean)
- [ ] **R-012:** UseCases implementieren: `SendMessage`, `StreamResponse`, `LoadConversations`

### P3 — Low (Sprint 3)

- [ ] **R-013:** Theme komplettieren — `app_text_styles.dart`, `app_theme.dart`
- [ ] **R-014:** Article-Feature ausbauen (eigene Widgets, bessere UI)
- [ ] **R-015:** Tests schreiben — Unit Tests für UseCases + Repositories
- [ ] **R-016:** `equatable` zu allen Entities/Models hinzufügen
- [ ] **R-017:** Error-Boundary Widget für globales Error-Handling

---

## Tech-Stack Reference

| Category | Current | Recommended |
|----------|---------|-------------|
| State Management | `provider` + ChangeNotifier | Keep (oder migriere zu `riverpod`) |
| Local Storage | `hive_flutter` | Keep (Hive passt gut zu Clean Arch) |
| Secure Storage | `flutter_secure_storage` | Keep |
| DI | Manual in main.dart | `get_it` + `injectable` |
| Routing | Navigator 1.0 | `go_router` |
| AI APIs | Custom HTTP Clients | Keep (Service-Abstraktion ist gut) |
| HTTP | `http` | Keep |
| Functional | None | `dartz` (Either für Error-Handling) |
